title: struthiopteris nipponica
intro: Struthiopteris nipponica, also known as the Japanese tongue fern, is a type of fern native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Struthiopteris nipponica is often used in teas and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
